# Confirm zero time.Time values are omitted from JSON. This is the
# omitzero fix — without it, fresh jobs leak '"last_run_at":
# "0001-01-01T00:00:00Z"' which an LLM might interpret as a real time.

exec eon add --cron '@hourly' --name c -- echo hi
exec eon show c --json
! stdout '0001-01-01'
! stdout '"fire_at"'
! stdout '"last_run_at"'
! stdout '"last_status"'

# Oneshot keeps fire_at populated.
exec eon add --at '+1h' --name o -- echo hi
exec eon show o --json
stdout '"fire_at"'
! stdout '0001-01-01'
